behaviourWithoutPython: IsAvailable probes `python --version`; when Python is absent every run returns Available=false and never throws.

pythonSkeleton.note: Skeleton runs when Python is present; full ML/scrape workers need a local venv.

honest: Bridge is safe-by-construction and tested without Python. The Python side is a stdlib-only skeleton, not a complete ML/scrape worker; real embedding/rerank/dataset/graph workers require a local venv and are not delivered this sprint.
